entities.name: Mirage

attributes.function: subject of conjuration; commands obedience under divine authority

entities.raw_quote: Adiuro te, Mirage, non mea vi set uirtute Spiritus Sancti, ut sis subiectus mandatis meis, ea sine mora perficienda.

entities.name: Satan

attributes.function: synonymous with Mirage in this conjuration; invoked under alternate name

entities.raw_quote: Coniuracio Satane / Mirage

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: arguant te Michael et Gabriel [et] Raphael

entities.name: Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: arguant te Michael et Gabriel [et] Raphael

entities.name: Raphael
entities.raw_quote: arguant te Michael et Gabriel [et] Raphael

entities.name: Abraham
entities.raw_quote: arguant te tres patriarche, scilicet Abraham, Ysaac, et Jacob

entities.name: Isaac
entities.raw_quote: arguant te tres patriarche, scilicet Abraham, Ysaac, et Jacob

entities.name: Jacob
entities.raw_quote: arguant te tres patriarche, scilicet Abraham, Ysaac, et Jacob

entities.name: Prophets
entities.raw_quote: arguant te prophete et omnes apostoli

entities.name: Apostles
entities.raw_quote: arguant te apostoli Christi; arguant te omnes sancti et electi dei

entities.name: Mambres

attributes.rank: demonic opponent (OT parallel to Jannes and Jambres)

entities.raw_quote: sicut defecerunt Iamnes et Mambres [II Tim 3:8]

entities.name: Ioseph

attributes.function: example of divine power over demonic pretenders

entities.raw_quote: Ilium metue qui in Ysaac est ymmolatus, in Ioseph venundatus, in agno occisus, in homine crucifixus

entities.name: Emanuel
entities.raw_quote: Emanuel, Sabaoth, Adonay

entities.name: Tetragrammaton
entities.raw_quote: Tetragramaton

entities.name: Alpha and Omega (Alpha et O)
entities.raw_quote: per Alpha et O, Christum filium tuum

entities.name: Shoeth, Hebatit, Het, Agla, Jocht, Othot, Vanecht, Nabuthi

attributes.function: divine names used in binding demons

entities.raw_quote: Shoeth, Hebatit, Het, Agla, Jocht, Othot, Vanecht, Nabuthi

entities.name: Athon, Onay, Anay, Anathon, Vegeido, Ya, Yayay, El, Blemutum, Vsyon, Vsy, Elyas
entities.raw_quote: Athon, Onay, Anay, Anathon, Vegeido, Ya, Yayay, El, Blemutum, Vsyon, Vsy, Elyas

entities.name: Herbs
entities.raw_quote: per virtutem lapidum, harbarum, et verborum, et nominum tuorum

entities.name: Stones
entities.raw_quote: per virtutem lapidum, harbarum, et verborum

entities.name: Blood

attributes.function: used in divine invocation (cf. Christ's blood)

entities.raw_quote: per sangwinem et aquam que exiuerunt de corpore tuo

entities.name: Water

attributes.function: used in divine invocation (cf. Christ's blood and water)

entities.raw_quote: per sangwinem et aquam que exiuerunt de corpore tuo

entities.name: Cross
entities.raw_quote: per virtutem crucis et passionis tue

entities.name: Sigillum Salomonis (Seal of Solomon)
entities.raw_quote: per sigillum Salominis, et per anulum - eius

entities.name: Septem Candelabra (Seven Golden Candlesticks)
entities.raw_quote: per septem candelabra aure. ante dominum lucencia

entities.name: Eucharist / Hostia Sancta
entities.raw_quote: per hostiam sanctam et per hostiam inmaculatam, per hostiam scriptam et per hostiam benedictam atque deo placente

entities.name: Baptism
entities.raw_quote: per potestatem quam habeo super te, Mirage, michi ab omnipotenti deo data in baptismo

entities.name: Exorcismus

attributes.function: act of binding and commanding spirits

entities.raw_quote: Exorcizo te, maledicte et mendacissime spiritus

entities.name: Coniuratio
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro et constringo atque precipio tibi

entities.name: Mandatum (command)

attributes.function: divine or ritual instruction to spirit

entities.raw_quote: mandatum meum et peticionem quam tibi manifestabo

summary: This chunk presents the conjuration of the demon Mirage (also called Satan), drawn from folios 59v–62v and parallel passages in CLM 849. It includes extensive invocations of divine names, biblical figures (patriarchs, prophets, apostles), and sacramental elements (cross, Eucharist, baptismal authority) to compel obedience. The ritual combines Christian liturgical language with magical formulae, invoking divine power over demons through Christ’s Passion, the Trinity, and sacred names like Tetragrammaton and Emanuel.
key_passages: Adiuro te, Mirage, non mea vi set uirtute Spiritus Sancti, ut sis subiectus mandatis meis, ea sine mora perficienda. Cede ministris Ihesu Christi.

Exorcizo te, maledicte et mendacissime spiritus, per verbum veritatis, per omnipotentem, per Ihesum Christum Nazarenum, agnum immaculatum de altissimo progression, de Spiritu Sancto conceptual, ex Maria virgine natum.
Imperat tibi dominus. Imperat tibi magestas. Imperat tibi deus Pater. Imperat tibi Filius. Imperat tibi Spiritus Sanctus.
Coniuro et constringo atque precipio tibi, vt sine aliquo nocumento michi nunc et semper obedias, sine lesione et grauamine corporis et anime mee.
Per omnia quibus constringi et ligari possis... per sigillum Salominis, et per anulum - eius, ix candarias celestes...
